credtech_1.name: Score Tower
credtech_1.title: SCORE TOWER
credtech_1.hint: ◀ ▶ grab ✅ on-time payments, dodge ⏰ late fees
lesson: Paying on time is the #1 thing that builds your credit score.
A higher score means people trust you to borrow.
Even one late payment can knock your score down.

credtech_2.name: Borrowing Bay
credtech_2.title: BORROWING BAY
credtech_2.hint: TAP smart borrowing to grow · skip the debt traps
lesson: Borrowing a little and paying it back grows your credit.
Only borrow what you can pay back on time.
Borrowing too much at once can hurt your score.

credtech_3.name: Trust Exchange
credtech_3.title: TRUST EXCHANGE
lesson: Your credit score is your money reputation.
Lenders check your score before they trust you.
Paying on time keeps your reputation strong.

qs.q: A credit score is best described as your…
Who looks at your credit score?
The fastest way to build trust is to…
A longer history of paying on time is…

credtech_4.name: Repayment Runway
credtech_4.title: REPAYMENT RUNWAY
credtech_4.hint: Tilt ◀ ▶ to keep payments balanced and on-time
lesson: Steady, on-time payments keep your credit on track.
Pay a little each month so debt never piles up.
Reminders help you never miss a due date.

credtech_5.name: Credit Lab
credtech_5.title: CREDIT LIMIT LAB
credtech_5.hint: FLIP cards · match the credit terms
lesson: Your credit limit is the most you are allowed to borrow.
Using under 30% of your limit helps your score.
Staying under the limit keeps your credit safe.

credtech_6.name: Report Watch
credtech_6.title: REPORT OBSERVATORY
credtech_6.hint: TAP ❌ errors to fix them · leave ✅ correct entries
lesson: A credit report lists how you have used credit.
Check your report so you can fix any mistakes.
Fixing errors keeps your score fair and accurate.
